markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Ianin / Mabrouk wins the Ianin / Mabrouk vs Chaurasia / Pratap Singh professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 Monastir Semifinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Ianin / Mabrouk vs Chaurasia / Pratap Singh professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 Monastir Semifinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Ianin / Mabrouk win the Ianin / Mabrouk vs Chaurasia / Pratap Singh: M15 Monastir Semifinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Soufiane Rahimi records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the France vs Morocco professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the France vs Morocco professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Soufiane Rahimi: 1+ goals

markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken at least 7 presidential actions from Jul 12, 2026 through Jul 18, 2026 (as checked on the “Presidential Actions” page at whitehouse.gov at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 19, 2026), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market solely resolves to the publication dates visibly displayed on the "Presidential Actions" tab at whitehouse.gov at at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 19, 2026. The week runs from Jul 12, 2026 through Jul 18, 2026. The actions may include proclamations, executive orders, nominations & appointments, and memoranda. Any item listed on the page counts, regardless of its legal effect.

Examples (for Jan 10, 2026):

Executive Order with a Jan 7 signing date is released with a Jan 10 publication date → resolves Yes
Proclamation e-mailed to White House Press Pool but not uploaded by 10:00 AM next day → resolves No
Proclamation is released Jan 10 with a backdated Jan 9 publication date → resolves No
Bill signed into law and shows up on "Briefings & Statements" instead of "Presidential Actions" → resolves No
markets.title: Will there be at least 7 presidential actions in the week of Jul 12, 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If the number of Truth Social posts by Donald Trump from Jul 12, 2026 to Jul 18, 2026 is below 80, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The observation period begins at 12:00 AM ET on Jul 12, 2026 and ends at 11:59 PM ET on Jul 18, 2026. The primary resolution source for this market is Roll Call. In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 19, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. "Between" is inclusive of the lower and upper bound.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump make below 80 Truth Social posts the week of Jul 12, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if complete Federal Register data becomes available.
markets.rules_primary: If the President signs above 2 executive orders during Jul 12, 2026 to Jul 18, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
An "Executive Order" is a numbered presidential directive that: is formally titled "Executive Order" followed by a number, is signed by the President, is published in the Federal Register, and has the force of law. All documents officially designated as "Executive Orders" with sequential numbering count, including Executive Orders that are later revoked or amended. 

The signing date as recorded in the Federal Register determines which period an Executive Order belongs to. If, for example, the period was "Jan 1, 2025 to Jan 7, 2025," and on January 10th the Federal Register published a numbered Executive Order with a January 7th signing date, the market would resolve to Yes. The latest Expiration Date of the Contract shall be two weeks after the end of the period. If an Executive Order that is dated past Jul 12, 2026 to Jul 18, 2026 is posted to the Federal Register, expiration may be moved to an earlier date.
markets.title: Will the President sign more than 2 Executive Orders between Jul 12, 2026 and Jul 18, 2026?
